title.en: SPG Certificate File Prepared For Export Documentation
title.zh: SPG 证书资料已整理完成，支持出口文件提交

excerpt.en: The SPG certificate package has been organized for buyer review, customer filing, and export coordination.
excerpt.zh: SPG 证书资料包已整理为可共享版本，便于采购审核、客户归档和出口协同。

body.en:
The SPG certificate package has been organized and can now be shared with partners who need structured document support for purchasing review, customer filing, and export coordination.

For export projects, having a certificate is only part of the work. The file also needs to be easy to forward, review, and archive.

The package is easier to share directly

The organized SPG file can be provided to customers faster without assembling scattered attachments late in the project. Customers can also pass it to internal sourcing, compliance, or category teams more easily.

Fewer document interruptions before shipment

When an order is close to shipment, last-minute document requests can disturb production and logistics timing. Preparing certificate files in advance reduces that friction.

A stable version helps future projects

A standardized package is also easier to reuse for repeat orders and long-term projects. When customers request the file again, the team can respond from the same version quickly.

Export Files Should Be Ready For Customer Use

After the SPG certificate package is organized, customers can use it more easily for purchasing files, channel review, and export-document preparation. Clear files reduce back-and-forth confirmation instead of simply adding another attachment.

Review These Points During Buyer Approval

Check pointReviewPractical use
Certificate informationName, number, date, applicable scopeSupports buyer filing
Product linkMatching series, sample, or order versionReduces mismatch between file and product
Export supportPackaging, labels, packing, delivery documentsHelps the order move forward

Qualification Files Should Serve Real Orders

For qualification files, test reports, supplier audits, or export documents, review compliance information, match the file with the right SKU through products, and send the document list through the contact page.

View ComplianceBrowse ProductsSend File Request
body.zh:
SPG 证书资料包已完成整理，可提供给需要规范文件支持的合作伙伴，用于采购审核、客户归档和出口协同。

出口项目中，证书是否“有”是一方面，是否便于转发、审核和归档同样重要。

资料包更适合直接共享

整理后的 SPG 文件可以更快提供给客户，不需要在项目后期临时拼接附件。客户收到后，也更方便转给内部采购、合规或品类团队。

减少出货前文件摩擦

当订单接近出货时，临时补资料会影响生产和物流节奏。提前准备证书资料，可以降低这些不必要的打断。

让后续项目沿用稳定版本

标准化资料包也便于复购和长期项目沿用。客户再次索取文件时，团队可以基于同一版本快速响应。

出口文件要能被客户直接使用

SPG 证书资料整理完成后，客户可以更方便地用于采购归档、渠道审核和出口文件准备。资料清楚的意义在于减少来回确认，而不是简单多放一份附件。

客户审核时可以重点核对

核对项建议查看实际作用
证书信息名称、编号、日期、适用范围便于客户归档
产品关联对应系列、样品或订单版本减少文件和产品不匹配
出口配合包装、标签、装箱和交付资料帮助订单进入下一步

资质资料应服务真实订单

如需进一步确认资质、测试报告、供应商审核或出口文件，可先查看 资质合规页面，再结合 产品中心 选择对应 SKU，并通过 联系页面 提交文件清单。

查看资质合规浏览产品提交文件需求
